svg.text: minimum_atomworks — Built-in Plugin Reference · Output Columns by Stage and Grain
Columns written to _prepared/pdb.parquet (PREPARE) and out_dir/pdb.parquet (EXECUTE). dataset_calculation writes to out_dir/dataset.parquet unless noted.
PREPARE STAGE → _prepared/pdb.parquet · runs before plugin execution · config keys: quality_controls / structure_manipulations
▸ pdb_manipulation (prepare_section = 'structure' · runs after QC · may mutate ctx.aa)
center__centroid_x · center__centroid_y · center__centroid_z [translates ctx.aa to origin; records pre-translation centroid]
sup__reference_path · sup__on_chains · sup__anchor_atoms · sup__alignment_method · sup__shared_atoms_rmsd · sup__shared_atoms_count · sup__coordinates_applied
pdb_calculation STAGE → merged out_dir/pdb.parquet · config key: plugins · each plugin: name + prefix + grain + run(ctx) → yield dict rows
▸ grain = 'structure' (one row per input file · identity keys: path, assembly_id)
sup__reference_path · sup__on_chains · sup__anchor_atoms · sup__alignment_method · sup__shared_atoms_rmsd · sup__shared_atoms_count [does not mutate ctx.aa — records metrics only]
▸ grain = 'chain' (one row per chain · identity keys: path, assembly_id, chain_id)
▸ grain = 'role' (one row per role · identity keys: path, assembly_id, role)
rolseq__sequence [full amino-acid sequence string for the role]
abcdr__cdr1_length · abcdr__cdr2_length · abcdr__cdr3_length [requires abnumber; skips non-antibody roles]
abseq__cdr1_sequence · abseq__cdr2_sequence · abseq__cdr3_sequence [full CDR loop sequences; scheme configurable]
▸ grain = 'interface' (one row per role-pair · identity keys: path, assembly_id, pair, role_left, role_right)

iface__contact_distance · iface__n_contact_atom_pairs · iface__n_left_interface_residues · iface__n_right_interface_residues · iface__left_interface_residues · iface__right_interface_residues [+ per-CDR contact columns if antibody roles]

ifm__contact_distance · ifm__left_n_interface_residues · ifm__right_n_interface_residues · ifm__left_interface_residues · ifm__right_interface_residues [uses configurable cell_size for spatial binning]
abepitope__score · abepitope__n_epitope_residues · (epitope residue detail columns) [requires abEpiTope; skips if not installed; input_model configurable]
rosetta__dG_separated · rosetta__dSASA_int · rosetta__hbonds_int · (full Rosetta InterfaceAnalyzer metrics) [requires Rosetta binary; available() returns False if missing]
dataset_calculation STAGE → reads merged pdb.parquet · config key: dataset_analyses · always runs post-merge on full dataset
▸ plugins run via analyze_dataset_outputs() · receive DatasetAnalysisContext · return DataFrame → stacked into dataset.parquet (cluster writes back to pdb.parquet)
pair · n_interfaces · n_left_unique_sequences · n_right_unique_sequences [aggregate counts per interface pair across dataset]
role · region · n_sequences · n_unique_sequences · shannon_entropy [params: roles=[], regions=['cdr1','cdr2','cdr3']]
cluster__<name>_cluster_id · cluster__<name>_mode · cluster__<name>_interface_side [writes back onto interface rows in pdb.parquet; params: jobs=[{name, pair, interface_side, distance_threshold}]]
Plugin Author Quick Reference — write name + prefix + grain + run(ctx) · register via entry_point group or directly in registry dict
class MyPlugin(BasePlugin): # or InterfacePlugin / ChainPlugin / RolePlugin
name = "my_metric" # key used in config.plugins list
grain = "interface" # inherited from base class (override if needed)
def run(self, ctx: Context) -> Iterable[dict]: # yield one dict per grain row
name = "my_analysis" # key used in config.dataset_analyses list

pdb_calculation · register via entry_points group "minimum_atw.plugins" · dataset_calculation · register via "minimum_atw.dataset_analyses" · prepare-stage plugins · register via "minimum_atw.structure_manipulations" / "minimum_atw.quality_controls"
